member.name: M:FlightStorageService.Controllers.FlightsController.GetFlightDepartureByCityAndDate(System.String,System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all the flights by specific date and departure city.
member.response: Returns flights by date and departure city.

member.name: M:FlightStorageService.Controllers.FlightsController.GetFlightArrivalByCityAndDate(System.String,System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all the flights by specific date and arrival city.
member.response: Returns flights by date and arrival city.

member.name: M:FlightStorageService.Controllers.FlightsController.GetFlightsByDate(System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves all the flights by specific date.

member.name: M:FlightStorageService.Controllers.FlightsController.UpdateFlight(System.String,FlightStorageService.Dtos.UpdateFlightDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.response: No flight found by flight number.

member.name: M:FlightStorageService.Controllers.FlightsController.DeleteFlight(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a Flight by Flight number.

member.name: M:FlightStorageService.Controllers.FlightsController.CleanupOldFlights(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a Flight before actual date.
